hotels.name: O Canada House Bed & Breakfast
hotels.description_fr:
Bénéficiant d'un emplacement idéal dans le centre-ville de Vancouver, le Bed & Breakfast O Canada House se trouve à moins de 2 km du parc Stanley. Vous pourrez déguster des collations tout au long de la journée. Les chambres disposent d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Décorées dans un style victorien, les chambres élégamment meublées de l'établissement sont équipées d'une télévision et d'un lecteur DVD. Certaines offrent une vue sur la ville. Un service de fax/photocopies est également à votre disposition.
L'établissement propose un petit-déjeuner et met à votre disposition un garde-manger garni disponible 24h/24. Vous pourrez apprécier à tout moment des collations faites maison, du café, du thé, des jus de fruits et des boissons sans alcool.
hotels.description_en:
Offering a convenient location in Vancouver city centre, this B&B lies within 2 km of Stanley Park. Snacks are available at all times, along with free in-room Wi-Fi.
Showcasing Victorian décor, each elegantly furnished room comes equipped with a flat-screen TV and DVD player. Select rooms at O Canada House boast a city view. Fax and photocopying facilities are also available.
In addition to breakfast, guests have 24-hour access to a stocked pantry. Home-baked snacks, coffee, tea, juice and soft drinks are always on hand.
To enjoy the outdoors, guests may lounge on O Canada House B&B’s garden terrace.
Coal Harbour offers marina views just 5 minutes’ drive from this B&B. Helicopter tours, hiking trails and wildlife viewing provide recreational options at Grouse Mountain 7 km away.
hotels.description_es:
Este bed and breakfast está en el centro de Vancouver, a 2 km de Stanley Park. Ofrece aperitivos las 24 horas y habitaciones con conexión Wi-Fi gratuita.
Todas las habitaciones del O Canada House presentan una decoración de estilo victoriano elegante y están equipadas con TV de pantalla plana y reproductor de DVD. Algunas tienen vistas a la ciudad. Hay servicio de fax y fotocopias.
Por la mañana se sirve un desayuno. Los huéspedes tienen acceso a una despensa bien surtida las 24 horas, que incluye aperitivos caseros, café, té, zumo y refrescos.
El O Canada House B&B cuenta con una terraza jardín al aire libre, perfecta para relajarse.
El bed and breakfast está a 5 minutos en coche de Coal Harbour, con vistas al puerto deportivo.
hotels.description_pt:
Offering a convenient location in Vancouver city centre, this B&B lies within 2 km of Stanley Park. Snacks are available at all times, along with free in-room Wi-Fi.
Showcasing Victorian décor, each elegantly furnished room comes equipped with a flat-screen TV and DVD player. Select rooms at O Canada House boast a city view. Fax and photocopying facilities are also available.
In addition to breakfast, guests have 24-hour access to a stocked pantry. Home-baked snacks, coffee, tea, juice and soft drinks are always on hand.
To enjoy the outdoors, guests may lounge on O Canada House B&B’s garden terrace.
Coal Harbour offers marina views just 5 minutes’ drive from this B&B. Helicopter tours, hiking trails and wildlife viewing provide recreational options at Grouse Mountain 7 km away.
hotels.description_it:
Questo b&b vi attende in una comoda posizione a Vancouver, a 2 km da Stanley Park. Offre alloggi con connessione Wi-Fi gratuita e snack tutto il giorno.
Tutte eleganti e caratterizzate da uno stile vittoriano, le camere dell'O Canada House presentano una TV a schermo piatto, un lettore DVD e, alcune, una vista sulla città. La struttura fornisce anche i servizi di fax e fotocopie.
Il b&b offre una prima colazione, l'accesso a una dispensa ben fornita 24 ore su 24, snack preparati in casa, caffè, tè, succhi di frutta e bevande analcoliche.
L'O Canada B&B vi darà modo di trascorrere piacevoli momenti di relax all'aperto nel suo giardino terrazzato.

hotels.name: EXchange Hotel Vancouver
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à moins de 200 mètres du centre commercial Waterfront Centre Mall Vancouver et du point de vue Vancouver Lookout at Harbor Centre, l’EXchange Hotel Vancouver propose des chambres climatisées. Une connexion Wi-Fi est disponible gratuitement.

L’Hydra Estiatorio Mediterranean & Bar est un restaurant de fruits de mer grec doté d’un bar à cocktails animé de 12 mètres. L’Hydra prépare des plats méditerranéens de qualité à base d’ingrédients grecs traditionnels, dans un style de cuisine traditionnel. L'ambiance élégante de cet espace vitré, idéal pour les événements de toute sorte, invite à la détente toute la journée et toute la soirée. 

Les chambres sont équipées d’une télévision à écran plat.

Le personnel de la réception se fera un plaisir de vous aider à tout moment de la journée.
hotels.description_en:
Situated within 200 metres of Waterfront Centre Mall Vancouver and Vancouver Lookout at Harbour Centre, EXchange Hotel Vancouver features rooms with air conditioning. Free WiFi is available.

Hydra Estiatorio Mediterranean & Bar is a Greek seafood restaurant with an engaging and lively 40-foot cocktail bar.  Hydra applies Greece’s time-honored ingredients with traditional cooking styles, focusing on quality Mediterranean dishes . The stylish ambiance of this glass enclosed space is perfect to enjoy throughout the day and evening and has expansive seating options; ideal for events of any size.

Guest rooms in the hotel are fitted with a flat-screen TV.

Staff at the reception can assist guests at any time of the day.
hotels.description_es:
El EXchange Hotel Vancouver se encuentra a 200 metros del centro comercial Waterfront Centre Mall Vancouver y del Vancouver Lookout at Harbor Center, y ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado. Hay WiFi gratuita.

Alberga el Hydra Estiatorio Mediterranean & Bar, un restaurante griego de marisco con una animada barra de cócteles de 12 metros. El Hydra elabora platos mediterráneos de calidad utilizando métodos e ingredientes tradicionales. El ambiente elegante de este espacio acristalado es perfecto para disfrutar durante todo el día y la noche y cuenta con amplias zonas de asiento, ideales para eventos de cualquier tamaño.

Las habitaciones del hotel disponen de TV de pantalla plana.

La recepción permanece abierta las 24 horas.
hotels.description_pt:
Situated within 200 metres of Waterfront Centre Mall Vancouver and Vancouver Lookout at Harbour Centre, EXchange Hotel Vancouver features rooms with air conditioning. Free WiFi is available.

Hydra Estiatorio Mediterranean & Bar is a Greek seafood restaurant with an engaging and lively 40-foot cocktail bar.  Hydra applies Greece’s time-honored ingredients with traditional cooking styles, focusing on quality Mediterranean dishes . The stylish ambiance of this glass enclosed space is perfect to enjoy throughout the day and evening and has expansive seating options; ideal for events of any size.

Guest rooms in the hotel are fitted with a flat-screen TV.

Staff at the reception can assist guests at any time of the day.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a 200 metri dal Waterfront Centre Mall Vancouver e dal Vancouver Lookout at Harbour Centre, l'EXchange Hotel Vancouver offre camere climatizzate. Potrete usufruire della connessione WiFi gratuita.

L'Hydra Estiatorio Mediterranean & Bar è un ristorante greco di pesce con un invitante e vivace cocktail bar di 12 metri. L'Hydra utilizza ingredienti della Grecia antica con lo stile di cucina tradizionale, concentrandosi su piatti mediterranei di qualità. L'elegante ambiente di questo spazio circondato da vetrate è perfetto giorno e sera e dispone di ampi posti a sedere, ideale per eventi di qualsiasi dimensione.

Le camere dell’hotel presentano una TV a schermo piatto.

Il personale della reception sarà inoltre lieto di fornirvi assistenza in qualsiasi momento della giornata.

hotels.name: Rosewood Hotel Georgia
hotels.description_fr:
Le Rosewood Hotel Georgia se trouve en face de la galerie d’art de Vancouver, à 5 minutes de marche des boutiques de Robson Street. Il propose une piscine intérieure d’eau salée idéale pour la nage en longueur, un spa et un service d’étage 24h/24.
Les chambres comprennent une télévision à écran plat. Leur salle de bains de style spa est pourvue de chauffage au sol, de peignoirs et de chaussons. Certaines chambres possèdent un spacieux salon avec des sièges confortables.
Vous pourrez déguster des produits de boulangerie, des sandwichs et du café au Bel Cafe. Le salon extérieur Reflections sert des repas légers et des cocktails. Des cocktails sont également servis dans le 1927 Lobby Lounge. Vous savourerez une cuisine canadienne contemporaine au restaurant Hawksworth.
hotels.description_en:
Across the street from the Vancouver Art Gallery, this hotel is a 5-minute walk from the Robson Street Shopping District. It offers an indoor saltwater lap pool, a spa and 24-hour room service.
The rooms at the Rosewood Hotel Georgia include a flat-screen TV. The spa-inspired bathroom has heated floors, bathrobes and slippers. Select rooms offer a spacious living room with comfortable seating.
Guests can enjoy baked goods, specialty sandwiches and coffee at Bel Cafe. Reflections Outdoor Lounge serves light fare and cocktails. Cocktails are available in the 1927 Lobby Lounge. Contemporary Canadian dining can be enjoyed at Hawksworth Restaurant.
The historic Rosewood offers a gym and a business center.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Rosewood Hotel Georgia

Este alojamiento está situado frente a la Galería de Arte de Vancouver, a 5 minutos a pie del distrito comercial de Robson Street. Cuenta con piscina alargada de agua salada cubierta, spa y servicio de habitaciones las 24 horas.

Las habitaciones del Rosewood Hotel Georgia incluyen TV de pantalla plana. El baño, de inspiración spa, cuenta con calefacción radiante, albornoces y zapatillas. Algunas habitaciones tienen sala de estar amplia con asientos cómodos.

La cafetería Bel Cafe sirve productos de panadería, bocadillos de la casa y café. En el salón exterior Reflections se puede disfrutar de comidas ligeras y cócteles. El salón del vestíbulo 1927 ofrece cócteles.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Rosewood Hotel Georgia

Across the street from the Vancouver Art Gallery, this hotel is a 5-minute walk from the Robson Street Shopping District. It offers an indoor saltwater lap pool, a spa and 24-hour room service.

The rooms at the Rosewood Hotel Georgia include a flat-screen TV. The spa-inspired bathroom has heated floors, bathrobes and slippers. Select rooms offer a spacious living room with comfortable seating.

Guests can enjoy baked goods, specialty sandwiches and coffee at Bel Cafe. Reflections Outdoor Lounge serves light fare and cocktails. Cocktails are available in the 1927 Lobby Lounge. Contemporary Canadian dining can be enjoyed at Hawksworth Restaurant.

The historic Rosewood offers a gym and a business center.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Rosewood Hotel Georgia

Questo hotel è situato di fronte alla Vancouver Art Gallery, a 5 minuti a piedi dall’area commerciale di Robson Street. Offre una piscina coperta con acqua salata, un centro benessere e il servizio in camera disponibile 24 ore su 24.

Le camere del Rosewood Hotel Georgia sono provviste di TV a schermo piatto. Il bagno in stile spa è dotato di riscaldamento a pavimento, accappatoi e pantofole. Alcune camere dispongono di un ampio soggiorno con comodi posti a sedere.

Potrete gustare prodotti da forno, panini speciali e caffè presso il Bel Cafe. Il Reflections Outdoor Lounge serve pasti leggeri e cocktail. Potrete godervi un cocktail anche nel 1927 Lobby Lounge.

hotels.name: Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify vous accueille à Guimarães, à 600 mètres de ce lieu d’intérêt : Monument Padrão do Salado. Il comprend un enregistrement/départ rapide, un jardin, une terrasse, des hébergements non-fumeurs, ainsi qu'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux. Il est installé à respectivement 600 mètres, 900 mètres et 24 km de : Palais des ducs de Bragance, Château de Guimarães et Cathédrale de Braga. L’établissement possède des transferts aéroport et un service de location de vélos.
Les hébergements comportent un patio. Vous bénéficierez de la climatisation, d’une télévision à écran plat, ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative avec un bidet et des articles de toilette gratuits. Certains hébergements possèdent également un balcon.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify in Guimarães offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a balcony with garden or city views, a work desk, and a soundproofed environment.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden or terrace, enjoy the outdoor seating area, and utilise the child-friendly buffet. Additional amenities include a lift, bike and car hire, and luggage storage.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental buffet breakfast is served daily, featuring fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice. Guests appreciate the quality and variety of the morning meal.
hotels.description_es:
Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify está en Guimarães, a 6 min a pie de Padrão do Salado, y dispone de servicio de check-in y check-out exprés, habitaciones libres de humo, jardín, wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento y terraza. El alojamiento está a unos 7 min a pie de Palacio Ducal, a 900 metros de Castillo de Guimarães y a 24 km de Catedral de Braga - La Sé. El alojamiento ofrece traslado para ir o volver del aeropuerto y también hay servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
En el hostal o pensión, todas las habitaciones están equipadas con patio. Todas las habitaciones del alojamiento tienen baño privado con bidet y artículos de aseo gratuitos, además de TV de pantalla plana y aire acondicionado. Algunas de las habitaciones también incluyen balcón.
hotels.description_pt:
Em Guimarães, a cerca de 6 minutos a pé de Padrão do Salado, Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify apresenta check-in e check-out expresso, quartos não fumador, um jardim, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade e um terraço. O alojamento está a cerca de 7 minutos a pé de Paço dos Duques de Bragança, a menos de 1 km de Castelo de Guimarães e a 24 km de Sé Catedral de Braga. O alojamento dispõe de transfers do aeroporto, mas um serviço de aluguer de bicicletas também está disponível.
No alojamento, cada quarto inclui pátio. Apresentando uma casa de banho privativa dispondo de bidé e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, todos os quartos do alojamento têm uma televisão de ecrã plano e ar condicionado, e alguns quartos estão equipados com varanda.
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Guimarães e distante 600 metri da Padrão do Salado, Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify propone il check-in e check-out express, camere non fumatori, un giardino, il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura e una terrazza. La struttura si trova a circa 600 metri da Palazzo dei Duchi di Braganza, 900 metri da Castello di Guimarães e 24 km da Cattedrale di Braga. La struttura mette a disposizione transfer aeroportuali oltre a un servizio di noleggio biciclette.
Presso questo affittacamere, tutte le camere comprendono un patio. Provviste di bagno privato con bidet e set di cortesia, tutte le camere presso Dom José Alojamentos by Guestify hanno la TV a schermo piatto e l’aria condizionata. Alcune camere sono fornite di un balcone.

hotels.name: Hotel de Charme Quinta do Pinheiro
hotels.description_fr:
Surrounded by lush gardens, Hotel de Charme Quinta do Pinheiro offers free WiFi and individually designed air-conditioned rooms with a cable TV.

A complimentary basket of fresh fruits as well as water and wine is provided on arrival. Toiletries and slippers, upon request, are in the bathrooms.

The hotel has a tea room with stained-glass windows where a continental breakfast made with fresh products is served every morning.

Porto Airport is a 30-minute drive from the hotel. The cities of Porto, Braga and Guimarães are all within a 35-minute drive from Hotel de Charme Quinta do Pinheiro.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 8,8 pour un séjour à deux.

Surrounded by lush gardens, Hotel de Charme Quinta do Pinheiro offers free WiFi and individually designed air-conditioned rooms with a cable TV.

A complimentary basket of fresh fruits as well as water and wine is provided on arrival. Toiletries and slippers, upon request, are in the bathrooms.

The hotel has a tea room with stained-glass windows where a continental breakfast made with fresh products is served every morning.

Porto Airport is a 30-minute drive from the hotel. The cities of Porto, Braga and Guimarães are all within a 35-minute drive from Hotel de Charme Quinta do Pinheiro.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 8.8 for a two-person trip.

hotels.name: Quinta de Silvalde
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Quinta de Silvalde se situe à Santo Tirso, à 26 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Monument Padrão do Salado. Il possède un service de prêt de vélos, une piscine extérieure ouverte en saison, une salle de sport et un parking privé gratuit. Il propose un restaurant, un jardin, une piscine intérieure et un bain à remous. L’établissement comprend une réception ouverte 24h/24, des transferts aéroport, un service d'étage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Tous les hébergements proposent la climatisation, un coin salon, une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du câble et un coffre-fort. Ils disposent également d’une salle de bains privative dotée d’une douche, d'articles de toilette gratuits et d'un sèche-cheveux. Vous bénéficierez d'une bouilloire.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Quinta de Silvalde in Santo Tirso offers family rooms with garden or pool views. Each room includes air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and modern amenities.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy an infinity swimming pool, spa and wellness centre, fitness centre, sun terrace, and free WiFi. Additional facilities include a hot tub, hammam, and electric vehicle charging station.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Portuguese, local, and international cuisines. Breakfast includes continental and buffet options with fresh pastries, fruits, and local specialities.
Convenient Location: Located 30 km from Francisco Sá Carneiro Airport, Quinta de Silvalde is near attractions such as Guimarães Castle (27 km) and Salado Memorial (26 km).
hotels.description_es:
Quinta de Silvalde se encuentra en Santo Tirso, a 26 km de Padrão do Salado, y ofrece alojamiento con bicicletas gratis, parking privado gratis, piscina de temporada al aire libre y centro de fitness. El alojamiento ofrece restaurante y también tiene jardín, piscina cubierta y bañera de hidromasaje. El alojamiento dispone de recepción 24 horas, traslado para ir o volver del aeropuerto, servicio de habitaciones y wifi gratis.
En el hotel, todas las habitaciones disponen de aire acondicionado, zona de estar, TV de pantalla plana con canales por cable, caja fuerte y baño privado con ducha, artículos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo. Las habitaciones tienen hervidor, algunas ofrecen terraza y otras también disponen de vistas a la montaña.
hotels.description_pt:
Quinta de Silvalde situa-se em Santo Tirso, a 26 km de Padrão do Salado, e dispõe de acomodações com bicicletas gratuitas, estacionamento privado gratuito, uma piscina exterior sazonal e um centro de fitness. Providenciando um restaurante, o alojamento também dispõe de um jardim, assim como piscina interior e banheira de hidromassagem. O alojamento fornece receção aberta 24 horas, transfers do aeroporto, serviço de quartos e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.
No alojamento, cada quarto inclui ar condicionado, área de estar, televisão de ecrã plano com canais por cabo, cofre e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo.
hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a Santo Tirso, a 26 km da Padrão do Salado, Quinta de Silvalde mette a disposizione biciclette gratuite, un parcheggio privato gratuito, una piscina all’aperto stagionale e un centro fitness. Dotato di un ristorante, l’alloggio dispone anche di un giardino, oltre a una piscina coperta e una vasca idromassaggio. L'alloggio prevede una reception 24 ore su 24, transfer aeroportuali, il servizo in camera e il WiFi gratuito.
Tutte le unità presso questo hotel hanno l’aria condizionata, un’area salotto, una TV a schermo piatto con canali via cavo, una cassaforte e un bagno privato con doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. Tutte le camere includono un bollitore elettrico, mentre alcune camere presentano una terrazza e altre comprendono anche la vista sulla montagna.
